name: Tempest [Dummies vs Noobs]
description:
$—❯(🔵)~ Introduction Be advised, Hotel-Tango is reporting a Tempest headed your way. Crowds are its specialty. Avoid bunching up, and getting too close. You, soldier Dominion, and the leadership sent you to the urban, you lived 2 waves and tempest came to the 3th wave and as a result you were left alone (of course you can try to rewrite the script, but I do not guarantee it)

$—❯(⚠)~ Warning Violence, NSWF, black joke, violent content are allowed

$—❯(📜)~ Tags - Roblox, Dummies Vs Noobs, DvN, tactical, military, enemy
